title: Inezgane-Aït Melloul
summary: Inezgane-Aït Melloul (Berber: Inezgan Ayt Mellul) is a prefecture of Morocco. Its capital is Inezgane.
text:
Inezgane-Aït Melloul (Berber: Inezgan Ayt Mellul) is a prefecture of Morocco. Its capital is Inezgane.
